title: Spanish PM's wife charged with corruption
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez’s wife, Begoña Gómez , has been formally charged with corruption after a years-long criminal investigation, according to a court ruling published Monday.

title: What to know before buying a foreclosed home in Spain

title: Spain's Granada struggles to stamp out 'poetic vandalism' by tourists
summary: The southern Spanish city of Granada is currently in a battle against graffiti tags and poetic messages plastered all over its white walls, particularly by tourists in the city's historic Albaicín neighbourhood.

title: 'Historic moment': European leaders react to Orban's defeat in Hungary
summary: European leaders reacted on Monday to the defeat of Viktor Orban, who lost Sunday's parliamentary elections in Hungary. Many hailed the result as a victory for democracy and for Europe.

summary: Spain may be better known for its wines than its beers, but it has some excellent varieties to choose from. Here's what 'cerveza' to order in different parts of the country.

title: Spain's PM calls China trade imbalance with EU 'unsustainable'
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez called China's trade imbalance with the European Union "unsustainable" on Monday, as he began a three-day visit to Beijing where he hopes to strengthen economic ties.
